summary: acquire: no gnosis.org html_multi crawler — Mandaean John-Book never lands
description:
Fix the download path so the Mandaean John-Book (gnosis.org, html_multi) can be acquired — or decide to drop it.

ROOT CAUSE (verified): acquire.py FORMAT_DISPATCH maps html_multi -> the sacred_texts downloader by format, not domain. There is no gnosis.org multi-page crawler: scripts/downloaders/gnosis_org.py is single-page only and is NOT wired into FORMAT_DISPATCH (dead code — Thomas/Philip actually go through generic_html). Even when routed to sacred_texts, its download() only crawls sub-pages when "index" is in the URL (sacred_texts.py:236); the manifest's mandaean URLs are leaf pages gjb-2-1.htm / gjb-2-2.htm. mandaean is the ONLY html_multi source not on sacred-texts.com -> the only one that never landed. The manifest also wrongly models two leaf chapter URLs as html_multi indexes.

TWO PATHS (decide before implementing):
(1) WIRE IT UP (recommended for cohesion — only living Gnostic religion, adjacent to Thomas/Philip):
    - Add gnosis.org multi-page support: either a multi-capable gnosis_org downloader + a dispatch route, or make dispatch domain-aware so html_multi picks the crawler by netloc.
    - Repoint the manifest at the real "Gnostic John the Baptizer" index (gnosis.org/library/grs-mead/gnostic_john_baptist/) and model its sub-pages.
    - Add chunking/mandaean/ config(s); run acquire.py + chunk.py + embed_corpus.py + graph rebuild.
    - Test: the downloader resolves >1 sub-page from the John-Book index; raw/mandaean/ + corpus/mandaean/ land with a plausible chunk_count.
(2) DROP IT: remove the 2 [[source]] entries (and NOTES references) from sources/manifest.toml. No corpus impact (nothing landed).

Parent: c75f8a2e.
